microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end **technical integration lifecycle** for enterprise partners (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), standardizing workflows across 45+ annual resilience drills and delivering **$14M+ in business impact**.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility.
Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase execution capacity by 21% — directly expanding integration throughput.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects across enterprise customer environments.
microsoft_2023: Drove **developer experience** improvements by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical API and tooling gaps that directly shaped the product roadmap.
Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows, leading technical demos and training sessions across **14 key teams** that saved 37 engineering hours monthly.
Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% for internal engineering users.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation framework, **accelerating region launches by 28%** and generating $3M in incremental revenue.
Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region, then built a **integration roadmap** to automate critical paths and reduce operational toil at launch.
Engineered a Power BI dashboard tracking toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to **prioritize high-impact automation** gaps with clear, data-driven visibility.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving zero operational downtime during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition.
Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing integration friction across teams.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and triaged 40+ high-priority tickets, stabilizing the **developer intake process** and unblocking engineering throughput across sprint cycles.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow that improved customer onboarding speed.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy with targeted website and Google profile optimization.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, delivering actionable profitability insights that sharpened deal strategy.
